recipient_context:
Name: Sarah Lin

Title: VP Engineering

subject: Rust review coverage for the perception stack
body: Hi Sarah, saw Acme shipped its Rust perception SDK last week. Most review tools lose coverage on Rust, which is where regressions slip through. We cut Rust false positives by 3x versus Copilot on real PRs. Open to a 15-minute look next week?

body: Hi Marcus, teams closing monthly in NetSuite usually lose two or three days to manual reconciliation. LedgerLoop matches transactions automatically and flags only the exceptions. One controller cut close time from five days to two. Worth a quick call?
